source.name: Everything-Claude-Code
source.policy: Reference the imported ECC source from AgentCodex extension manifests; do not duplicate files into active command or role directories unless explicitly ported.

core.description: Minimal harness baseline with commands, hooks, platform configs, and quality workflow support.

developer.description: Default engineering profile for most ECC users working across app codebases.

security.description: Security-heavy setup with baseline runtime support and security-specific guidance.

research.description: Research and content-oriented setup for investigation, synthesis, and publishing workflows.

full.description: Complete ECC install with all currently classified modules.

activation_policy.no_duplicate_rule: Do not duplicate active surfaces: if AgentCodex already has an active command or role with the same filename, keep the ECC source as upstream reference and do not copy it into docs/commands or docs/roles.
activation_policy.porting_rule: Port only through an explicit AgentCodex procedure, role, profile, or validator change with tests.
activation_policy.runtime_rule: Keep Claude/OpenCode hook or slash-command assumptions in the imported layer unless they are normalized to Codex file-based behavior.
